cit.basis: 30% CIT on resident companies; 48% on non-resident companies. Administered by the Internal Revenue Commission (IRC).

special_rates.mining_and_petroleum: Resource-sector regimes (mining, oil and gas) apply specific rates, additional profits tax and levies.

cit.note: Mining and petroleum resource-sector regimes are out of scope for this SME estimator.

gst.note: 10% Goods and Services Tax on most goods and services.

metadata.caveat: AI-estimated rates and thresholds. Figures have NOT been verified against primary IRC legislation or guidance and must be confirmed before any filing, advice, or production use.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified, AI-estimated LedgerField estimates.
Residency status, resource-sector regimes, incentives, WHT, relief and sector rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official IRC guidance and a local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
